personal.name: Agrim Sigdel
personal.summary: Versatile Full-Stack Developer with a strong foundation in modern AI, engineering production-ready applications using React/TypeScript and Python/Django. Adept at building scalable REST APIs, optimizing relational databases, and implementing clean architecture across web, mobile, and open-source platforms. I bridge the gap between complex AI models and user-centric applications.
personal.shortSummary: Full-Stack Developer & AI Researcher building production-ready applications with React, TypeScript, and Python/Django - and shipping open-source tools.

education.degree: BSc. Computer Science and Information Technology (CSIT)
education.school: Prime College, Tribhuvan University | Kathmandu, Nepal

description: Engineer a high-performance mobile application using React Native and TypeScript, with strict adherence to component state-management best practices.
Refactor and optimize backend REST APIs for seamless compatibility, efficient serialization, and low-latency payloads between server and client.
Debug and resolve full-stack integration bottlenecks, improving database query handling and streamlining endpoints for real-time features.
Spearheaded full-stack development, optimization, and deployment for Feriaau and its multi-tenant CRM platform.
Owned the complete lifecycle - modular Python/Django backend services, robust REST APIs, and dynamic React.js/TypeScript interfaces.
Configured secure production servers and automated CI/CD pipelines, ensuring high availability and seamless code delivery.
Optimized PostgreSQL/MySQL schemas and queries to maximize application speed and multi-tenant isolation.
Led creative direction and brand guidelines for 625+ attendees, coordinating event planning and execution.
Managed cross-functional teams for visual and marketing materials, practicing agile task delegation.
Designed, built, and shipped a range of client projects end-to-end - from responsive marketing websites to full-stack web applications.
Worked directly with clients to scope requirements, translate them into clean designs, and deliver production-ready code on schedule.
Handled the full delivery pipeline including frontend, backend, deployment, and post-launch maintenance across varied tech stacks.

research.citation: Sigdel, A., Thapa, S., Thapa Magar, B., & Gajurel, R.K. "Cascaded AI Task Decomposition: A Generalizable Framework for Multi-Stage Computer Vision Pipelines Validated on Automated Number Plate Recognition for Nepali License Plates."
research.title: Cascaded AI Task Decomposition (CATD)
research.summary: A generalizable design pattern for multi-stage computer vision pipelines, validated on bi-scriptual Nepali license-plate recognition.
highlights: Formalized the CATD framework as a generalizable design pattern for multi-stage CV pipelines with applications beyond ANPR.
Achieved 97.9% mAP50 plate localization and 98.9% mAP50 character recognition using custom-trained YOLOv11n and RT-DETR Base on 61-class bi-scriptual Nepali plates.
Built a two-dimensional cross-domain training strategy (1,380 Nepali + 1,127 Indian plates) enabling compositional zero-shot transfer (+24.5 pp improvement).
Engineered a three-stage cascaded pipeline (YOLOv8n → YOLOv11n → RT-DETR) reaching 90.4% end-to-end precision with 61%–73% compute reduction via intelligent vehicle gating.
Integrated the system as the computer-vision backbone of a smart-parking platform handling automated billing and real-time traffic analytics.

projects.title: Feriaau
projects.description: Lead full-stack engineer for Feriaau - a production web platform built on a modular Python/Django backend with a dynamic React.js/TypeScript frontend, deployed on secure servers with automated CI/CD.
projects.outcome: Shipped and maintained in production with high availability and a streamlined release pipeline.

projects.title: Feriaau CRM
projects.description: Multi-tenant CRM platform powering Feriaau's operations - robust REST APIs, optimized PostgreSQL/MySQL schemas, and strict tenant isolation across the data layer.
projects.outcome: Maximized application speed and secure multi-tenant isolation for concurrent organizations.

projects.title: Feriaau App
projects.description: Contributor to the Feriaau mobile app - a cross-platform Flutter application for Feriaau users, sharing backend services and REST APIs with the web platform.
projects.outcome: Published on the Google Play Store and Apple App Store for iOS and Android.

projects.title: ContractorOps AI App
projects.description: High-performance mobile application built with React Native and TypeScript for Contractor Ops AI, with refactored low-latency backend REST APIs and strict component state-management practices.
projects.outcome: Currently building the app: streamlining real-time application features and resolving full-stack integration bottlenecks across the stack.

projects.title: ANPR + Smart Parking System
projects.description: Three-stage cascaded computer-vision pipeline (YOLOv8n → YOLOv11n → RT-DETR) for bi-scriptual Nepali plate recognition, serving as the backbone of an automated smart-parking platform.
projects.outcome: 90.4% end-to-end precision with 61%–73% compute reduction; powers automated billing and real-time traffic analytics.

projects.title: Reddit Sentiment Analysis
projects.description: Deep NLP pipeline using fine-tuned BERT for nuanced emotion classification on large-scale Reddit data, integrated with LLM-based frontend interfaces.
projects.outcome: Nuanced multi-class emotion classification with advanced prompt-engineering integration.

projects.title: easy-3dkit
projects.description: Creator and maintainer of an open-source library of interactive 3D components for React, built natively on Three.js, React Three Fiber (R3F), and GSAP.
projects.outcome: Drop-in scroll-reactive surfaces, particle fields, instanced layouts, and post-processing - lightweight and production-ready.
